title: Knives Out
logline: When a famous mystery writer is found dead after his 85th birthday party, a Southern detective investigates the eccentric family while the victim's nurse tries to hide her own dark secret.
antagonistOrConflict: Ransom Drysdale and the web of family deception
tone: Darkly comedic whodunit with satirical edge

actBreaks.description: Marta's interrogation ends and the investigation shifts from gathering information to active pursuit of the truth.

validation.ruling: Scene #78 shows Marta successfully lying to the police about the night's events, fundamentally shifting the story from investigation setup to Marta actively concealing her perceived guilt while being pursued by Blanc.

actBreaks.description: Blanc begins his final revelation, transitioning from investigation to exposition of the complete conspiracy.

validation.ruling: Scene #152 shows Blanc beginning his final revelation about the true killer, transitioning from Marta's confession attempt into the climactic unraveling of Ransom's conspiracy - the point of no return before the final confrontation.

naturalStructure.structuralPersonality: This script employs a sophisticated non-linear structure that weaves between present-day interrogations and flashbacks to the night of the murder. The story functions as both a classical whodunit and a subversive commentary on the genre, with the detective work happening in parallel with Marta's attempts to cover up what she believes is her own crime. The structure cleverly misdirects the audience by making the protagonist complicit in the cover-up while gradually revealing she was manipulated by the real villain. The interrogation scenes serve as a framing device that allows for controlled revelation of information.
naturalStructure.pacingNotes: The pacing accelerates significantly after scene 78 when the interrogations end, moving from methodical questioning to active chase sequences and revelations. The middle section (scenes 90-140) maintains tension through a series of escalating complications and near-misses. The final act slows for Blanc's extended explanation before building to the climactic confrontation.

incitingIncident.description: Fran opens the study door and discovers Harlan Thrombey's corpse with his throat slit, nearly dropping her tray in shock.

validation.ruling: Scene #5 shows Fran discovering Harlan's corpse with his throat slit, which completely shatters the ordinary world and establishes the central mystery that drives the entire plot. This irreversible event occurs at 1.6% into the script and forces all characters, especially Marta, into action.

midpoint.description: Ransom and Marta sit in a restaurant booth where he encourages her to eat while she calls the inheritance a nightmare, and he agrees that Harlan's decision had more to do with the family's behavior than with her.

validation.ruling: Scene #111 is too passive for a midpoint - it's just conversation over dinner. Scene #107 (p70, 56%) is the true midpoint where Blanc reveals the toxicology report showing no drugs in Harlan's system, forcing Marta to shift from reactive hiding to proactive investigation of what really happened that night.

climax.description: Ransom looks afraid for the first time and asks if Fran is alive, then Marta receives a hospital call confirming Fran is okay and ready to talk, before Ransom lunges at Marta with a knife but gets tackled by officers.

validation.ruling: Scene #185 is just a single line of dialogue. Scene #191 (p121, 96.8%) contains the climactic confrontation where Ransom attacks Marta with a knife after being fully exposed, representing the peak physical danger and final confrontation between protagonist and antagonist.

scenes.heading: EXT. THROMBEY ESTATE MANOR HOUSE - DAWN
scenes.summary: The camera establishes the misty pre-dawn grounds of a New England manor house.

scenes.heading: INT. MANOR - PANTRY / LIVING ROOM / FOYER / HALLWAY - DAWN
scenes.summary: The interior of the gothic manor is revealed, unlit and still, with party debris scattered throughout the rooms.

scenes.heading: INT. THROMBEY ESTATE - 2ND FLOOR - DAWN
scenes.summary: Housekeeper Fran carries a coffee tray up the stairs through the quiet house, stepping lightly to avoid waking anyone.

scenes.heading: INT. THROMBEY ESTATE - 3RD FLOOR MASTER BEDROOM - DAWN
scenes.summary: Fran finds Harlan's master bedroom empty with an unslept-in bed, then heads up to his study calling out to him.

scenes.heading: INT. HARLAN THROMBEY'S STUDY - DAWN
scenes.summary: Fran opens the study door and discovers Harlan Thrombey's corpse with his throat slit, nearly dropping her tray in shock.
scenes.turningPointNote: The inciting incident - Harlan's body is discovered, launching the murder mystery

scenes.heading: INT. MARTA'S BEDROOM - MORNING
scenes.summary: Marta Cabrera wakes with a cry in her cramped bedroom, catches her breath, and opens a window.

scenes.heading: EXT. SOUTH BOSTON HOUSING PROJECT - MORNING
scenes.summary: Marta appears at her apartment window in a South Boston housing project, one week after Harlan's death.

scenes.heading: INT. CABRERA KITCHEN - MORNING
scenes.summary: Marta searches job sites on her laptop while her family watches murder-related TV, her mother asking Alice to turn it off.

scenes.heading: EXT. PRIVATE ROAD - LATE MORNING
scenes.summary: Marta drives her small car down the private road leading to the Thrombey estate.

scenes.heading: EXT. THROMBEY ESTATE FRONT DRIVE
scenes.summary: Marta arrives at the estate where police are present, a cop questions her, and Meg defends her before they embrace and cry.

scenes.heading: INT. FOYER
scenes.summary: Linda greets Marta at the door, mentioning she thought Marta should have been at the funeral, while Richard talks on the phone nearby.

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY
scenes.summary: Lieutenant Elliott introduces himself and Trooper Wagner to Linda for questioning, with a mysterious man in a linen suit observing silently.

scenes.heading: INT. LIVING ROOM - NIGHT OF THE PARTY - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: In flashback, Linda describes the party guests including family members, Fran, Marta, and ancient Greatnana eating at the snack table.

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY
scenes.summary: Elliott questions Linda about arrival times while the mysterious man taps a piano key, and Linda corrects that she owns her real estate company.

scenes.heading: INT. LIVING ROOM - NIGHT OF THE PARTY
scenes.summary: Flashback shows Harlan surrounded by his family at his birthday cake with everyone smiling.

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY
scenes.summary: Elliott questions Walt about running the publishing company while Walt describes his family, and quick cuts show different family members' contradictory opinions about Jacob.

scenes.heading: INT. LIVING ROOM - NIGHT OF THE PARTY
scenes.summary: Flashback shows Walt cornering and pleading with Harlan, who leads him away for a private conversation that leaves Walt looking wounded.

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY
scenes.summary: Walt denies having an argument with Harlan when Blanc presses him about their private conversation.

scenes.heading: INT. LIVING ROOM - NIGHT OF THE PARTY
scenes.summary: Flashback reveals Harlan firing Walt from the publishing company and cutting him off financially during their private talk.

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY
scenes.summary: Walt lies about their conversation being about e-books, then deflects by mentioning Ransom's argument with Harlan.

scenes.heading: INT. LIVING ROOM - NIGHT OF THE PARTY
scenes.summary: Flashback shows the family hearing indistinct shouting from Harlan's study before Ransom storms out of the party past Greatnana.

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY - PRESENT
scenes.summary: Blanc questions Richard about helping caterers and reveals the caterer heard Harlan in a screaming match that afternoon.

scenes.heading: INT. LIVING ROOM - NIGHT OF THE PARTY
scenes.summary: A caterer pauses in the hallway hearing Harlan shout the phrase 'you tell her or I will' through the wall.

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY
scenes.summary: Blanc repeats Harlan's threatening phrase to Richard, who considers his response carefully before flashing back.

scenes.heading: INT. LIVING ROOM - NIGHT OF THE PARTY
scenes.summary: Flashback shows Harlan confronting Richard with photos of his affair and threatening to tell Linda via a sealed letter.

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY
scenes.summary: Richard lies that the argument was about putting Harlan's mother in a nursing home, then Blanc begins questioning Joni.

scenes.heading: INT. LIVING ROOM - NIGHT OF THE PARTY
scenes.summary: Flashback reveals Harlan confronting Joni about double-dipping Meg's tuition money, stealing a hundred thousand dollars from him.

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY
scenes.summary: Joni lies that it was just a money wiring issue with the school, and Elliott calls for a break.

scenes.heading: INT. DRAWING ROOM - NIGHT OF THE PARTY
scenes.summary: Joni emerges from questioning rattled but composes herself when Linda asks if she's seen Richard.

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY
scenes.summary: Richard searches Harlan's desk, finds the threatening letter which turns out to be blank, then angrily throws Harlan's baseball out the window.

scenes.heading: INT. LIVING ROOM - NIGHT OF THE PARTY
scenes.summary: Blanc, Elliott and Wagner walk outside discussing the case, with Elliott questioning why Blanc is involved, as Blanc picks up the thrown baseball.

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY
scenes.summary: Marta eavesdrops on the conversation through glass doors until Blanc's face suddenly appears next to hers, startling her.

scenes.heading: INT. HALLWAY - DAY OF PARTY
scenes.summary: Blanc invites Marta to join them and questions her about her nursing arrangement with Harlan, learning she was hired as both medical help and friend.

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY
scenes.summary: Flashback shows Harlan showing Marta the photos of Richard's affair on his laptop.

scenes.heading: INT. SMALL STUDY - DAY OF PARTY
scenes.summary: Marta tries to lie about Richard's affair but immediately vomits into a planter, revealing her inability to lie without getting sick.
scenes.turningPointNote: Marta's physical inability to lie is revealed, establishing a key character trait that will drive the plot

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY
scenes.summary: Flashback shows Harlan discovering Joni's financial deception through a letter from his business manager.

scenes.heading: INT. SMALL STUDY - DAY OF PARTY
scenes.summary: Blanc presses Marta about Joni's theft and she struggles against nausea before nodding confirmation, while the officers dismiss weak motives.

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY
scenes.summary: Elliott explains how Linda's light sleeping allowed them to track everyone's movements via the creaky stairs that night.

scenes.heading: INT. FOYER - DAY
scenes.summary: Flashback shows the family members going to their respective bedrooms after Marta took Harlan upstairs for his medication.

scenes.heading: INT. SMALL STUDY
scenes.summary: Richard sleeps deeply while Linda sleeps lightly in their guest room, positioned to hear the creaky stairs.

scenes.heading: EXT. SIDE OF HOUSE - DAY
scenes.summary: Joni meditates in her decorated room when she hears a ka-thunk sound from somewhere above in the house.

scenes.heading: INT. FOYER
scenes.summary: Marta sits alone looking at Harlan's portrait and eavesdrops on the investigators' conversation outside.

scenes.heading: EXT. PATIO
scenes.summary: Blanc opens the door and invites the startled Marta to join their discussion about the case.

scenes.heading: EXT. PATIO - DAY - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: Blanc questions Marta about her nursing duties and relationship with Harlan, learning she provided both medical care and friendship.

scenes.heading: EXT. PATIO - DAY
scenes.summary: Flashback shows Marta reading to Harlan as he sadly shows her the photos of Richard's affair on his laptop.

scenes.heading: INT. STUDY - DAY - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: Marta struggles against nausea when asked about Richard's affair, attempts to lie, then immediately vomits again.

scenes.heading: EXT. PATIO - DAY
scenes.summary: Flashback shows Harlan discovering Joni's double-dipping scheme through his business manager's letter.

scenes.heading: INT. SECOND FLOOR LANDING - NIGHT OF PARTY
scenes.summary: Blanc forces Marta to confirm Joni's theft despite her nausea, while the officers debate weak motives and Blanc notes all three family members lied.

scenes.heading: INT. RICHARD AND LINDA'S GUEST ROOM - NIGHT OF THE PARTY
scenes.summary: Elliott explains how Linda's light sleeping and the creaky stairs allowed them to track movements, as the family went to bed after Marta took Harlan upstairs.

scenes.heading: INT. JONI AND MEG'S GUEST ROOM - NIGHT OF PARTY
scenes.summary: Joni meditates in her candlelit room when a ka-thunk sound from above catches her attention.

scenes.heading: INT. SECOND FLOOR LANDING - NIGHT OF PARTY
scenes.summary: Joni walks up the creaky stairs to investigate Harlan's wellbeing, waking Linda in the process.

scenes.heading: INT. RICHARD AND LINDA'S GUEST ROOM - NIGHT OF PARTY
scenes.summary: Linda's eyes pop open as she hears the creaking sounds from outside her room.

scenes.heading: INT. THIRD FLOOR LANDING - NIGHT OF PARTY
scenes.summary: Joni knocks on Harlan's office door and finds him alive with Marta preparing a hypodermic needle, sees the spilled GO board, kisses Harlan goodnight and leaves.

scenes.heading: INT. RICHARD AND LINDA'S GUEST ROOM - NIGHT OF PARTY
scenes.summary: Linda is woken a second time by creaking sounds as Marta leaves the house.

scenes.heading: EXT. FRONT PORCH - NIGHT OF PARTY
scenes.summary: Walt and Jacob sit on the porch as Marta says goodbye and drives off at midnight, with Walt noting the time.

scenes.heading: INT. RICHARD AND LINDA'S GUEST ROOM - NIGHT OF PARTY
scenes.summary: Linda is woken for the third time by someone coming down the creaky stairs.

scenes.heading: EXT. FRONT PORCH - NIGHT OF PARTY
scenes.summary: Walt spots Harlan coming downstairs for midnight snacks, tells him to go to bed, and watches him return upstairs through the glazed glass.

scenes.heading: INT. JONI AND MEG'S GUEST ROOM - NIGHT OF PARTY
scenes.summary: Meg wakes up around 3am because the dogs are barking outside, uses the bathroom, and returns to bed.

scenes.heading: EXT. PATIO - DAY
scenes.summary: Elliott concludes that everyone's stories matched and all movements are accounted for, while Blanc shows interest in the single creaky staircase access to Harlan's room.

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY - LATE AFTERNOON
scenes.summary: Blanc asks Marta to recount in detail what happened during the crucial half hour between 11:30 and midnight when she was with Harlan.

scenes.heading: INT. HARLAN'S BEDROOM - NIGHT - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: Marta leads Harlan upstairs at 11:32, trying to get him to go straight to bed instead of to his office.

scenes.heading: INT. HARLAN THROMBEY'S STUDY - NIGHT - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: Harlan insists on playing GO despite the late hour, Marta prepares his medicine, they play their game with playful banter until Harlan jokingly shakes the table and knocks over the board.

scenes.heading: EXT. FRONT PORCH - NIGHT OF THE PARTY - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: Marta loudly announces her departure to Walt on the porch, calling attention to the midnight time as instructed by Harlan's voice-over.

scenes.heading: INT. MARTA'S CAR - NIGHT - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: Marta drives out the gate and gets confused about Harlan's instructions regarding the carved elephant statue, pulling off before it.

scenes.heading: EXT. WOODS - NIGHT - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: Marta parks her car and trudges through the woods back toward the house on foot.

scenes.heading: EXT. THROMBEY ESTATE SIDE GATE - NIGHT - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: Marta enters through the side gate as the dogs recognize her and don't bark, following Harlan's plan.

scenes.heading: EXT. THROMBEY ESTATE SIDE YARD - NIGHT - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: Marta climbs the side trellis to reach the third floor window, with a piece breaking under her foot and leaving her hanging by one hand.

scenes.heading: INT. THIRD FLOOR LANDING - NIGHT - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: Marta enters through a hidden window behind a swinging wall panel into Harlan's bedroom.

scenes.heading: INT. HARLAN'S BEDROOM - NIGHT - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: Marta picks up Harlan's robe and cap from his bedroom, hesitating with doubt about the plan.

scenes.heading: INT. HARLAN THROMBEY'S STUDY - NIGHT - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: Marta expresses that the plan is crazy, but Harlan insists it will make her seem impossible as a suspect to the average cop.

scenes.heading: INT. HARLAN'S BEDROOM - NIGHT - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: Marta puts on Harlan's robe and cap, tucking her hair underneath.

scenes.heading: INT. SECOND FLOOR LANDING - NIGHT OF PARTY - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: Disguised as Harlan, Marta creeps down the creaky stairs toward Walt and Jacob outside.

scenes.heading: INT. FOYER - NIGHT OF PARTY - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: Marta freezes as Walt tells her to go to bed through the glazed window, then heads back upstairs, establishing Harlan was seen alive after she left.
scenes.turningPointNote: The alibi deception is successfully executed, making Marta appear impossible as a suspect

scenes.heading: INT. SECOND FLOOR LANDING - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Marta climbs back up the creaky stairs as Harlan's voice-over explains she's gone from suspect number one to an impossibility.

scenes.heading: INT. HARLAN'S BEDROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Marta returns to Harlan's bedroom and removes the robe and cap.

scenes.heading: EXT. THROMBEY ESTATE SIDE YARD - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Marta climbs down the trellis but freezes when Greatnana mistakes her for Ransom through the window, then escapes when the old woman doesn't recognize her.

scenes.heading: INT. HARLAN THROMBEY'S STUDY - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Harlan instructs Marta not to lie but to tell fragments of the truth in exact order since she can't lie without vomiting.

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY - LATE AFTERNOON
scenes.summary: Marta carefully recounts her story to the detectives, describing the GO game, Joni's visit, giving Harlan pain medication, and leaving at midnight.

scenes.heading: INT. FOYER - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Marta walks calmly out of the library and into a small bathroom.

scenes.heading: INT. HALF BATH
scenes.summary: Marta locks herself in the bathroom, turns on the taps, and vomits into the toilet.

scenes.heading: INT. LINDA'S ROOM
scenes.summary: Linda examines pink notecards with sweet notes from her father while Walt checks on her before the memorial.

scenes.heading: INT. LIVING ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: At the memorial reception, Marta stares shell-shocked at Harlan's portrait while Fran tearfully insists he didn't kill himself.

scenes.heading: INT. LIVING ROOM - NIGHT OF PARTY - FLASHBACK - NIGHT
scenes.summary: During the night of the party, the family has a heated political argument about immigration while Marta stays on the outskirts and Fran offers champagne.

scenes.heading: INT. LIVING ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Back at the memorial, Marta sways and braces herself against the wall as Fran continues talking and Meg rushes to help her.

scenes.heading: INT. DRAWING ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Fran unlocks a hidden drawer in the mantle clock to retrieve a joint for Meg to help calm Marta.

scenes.heading: INT. LIVING ROOM
scenes.summary: Walt tells Marta that the family has decided they want to take care of her financially.

scenes.heading: EXT. SIDE PORCH - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Marta encounters Blanc smoking alone on the porch, where he tells her something is afoot and that he believes she knows it too.

scenes.heading: INT. CABRERA LIVING ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Marta arrives home and sits silently with her mother on the couch watching TV.

scenes.heading: INT. HARLAN THROMBEY'S STUDY - NIGHT - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: In flashback, Harlan tells Marta she must do what she has to do to beat this situation and win, for him.

scenes.heading: INT. OUTSIDE HARLAN'S ATTIC OFFICE DOOR - NIGHT - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: Marta stands frozen outside Harlan's office door, hearing Walt and Jacob downstairs, then decides to push back into the office.

scenes.heading: INT. HARLAN THROMBEY'S STUDY - NIGHT - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: Marta finds Harlan with an ornate dagger against his throat, and despite her attempt to stop him, he draws the blade across his throat and blood sprays.
scenes.turningPointNote: Harlan's suicide is revealed, showing the true cause of his death and Marta's traumatic witness to it

scenes.heading: EXT. THIRD FLOOR LANDING - NIGHT - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: Marta breathes hard and cries silently on the landing, then wipes her eyes as resolve settles and she bounds down the stairs.

scenes.heading: INT. CABRERA LIVING ROOM
scenes.summary: Back in the present, Marta comforts her mother on the couch, unaware of a single drop of blood on her white sneaker.

scenes.heading: EXT. THROMBEY ESTATE GUARD GATE - MORNING
scenes.summary: Marta arrives at the estate guard gate where Blanc, Elliott and Wagner wait for her.

scenes.heading: INT. GUARD HOUSE
scenes.summary: Security guard Mr. Proofroc shows them the old-fashioned security setup with a VHS system in the cramped guard house.

scenes.heading: EXT. WOODS - DAY
scenes.summary: The group hikes through the woods as Wagner discusses the estate's statues and Marta discretely pockets something after handing over a VHS tape.

scenes.heading: EXT. THROMBEY ESTATE SIDE YARD
scenes.summary: Marta notices her own footprints in the soft earth around the pedestrian gate, then Blanc spots the footprints and calls for everyone to freeze, but Marta has already walked through.
scenes.turningPointNote: Marta's footprints from her secret return are discovered, threatening to expose her involvement

scenes.heading: INT. HARLAN THROMBEY'S STUDY
scenes.summary: In Harlan's study, Blanc asks about Marta's missing medical bag and examines the GO board while questioning how it got knocked over.

scenes.heading: EXT. THROMBEY ESTATE FRONT DRIVE
scenes.summary: Ransom arrives at the estate, kicks off the dogs, and dismissively blows past Elliott and Wagner who want to question him.

scenes.heading: INT. LIVING ROOM
scenes.summary: Ransom enters the living room eating cookies, refuses to talk to the officers claiming distress, and rudely demands Fran get him milk before Meg confronts him.

scenes.heading: INT. HALF BATH - NIGHT OF PARTY - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: Jacob sits on the toilet and hears shouting through a vent, making out the words 'my will' from Harlan.

scenes.heading: INT. LIVING ROOM
scenes.summary: Jacob reveals he heard Ransom say 'I'm warning you' during the argument, and Walt triumphantly declares that Harlan cut Ransom out of the will while the family turns cold toward Ransom.

scenes.heading: EXT. FRONT PORCH
scenes.summary: Blanc and Marta stand on the porch listening to the family shouting inside when Fran storms out calling someone an asshole, and a dog drops a piece of broken wood at Blanc's feet.

scenes.heading: EXT. THROMBEY ESTATE SIDE YARD
scenes.summary: Blanc examines the broken piece against a trellis on the side of the house, finding a fresh break and spotting a boarded window above it.

scenes.heading: INT. LIVING ROOM
scenes.summary: Blanc and Marta walk through the screaming family and head upstairs, followed by Elliott and Wagner while Ransom watches but doesn't follow.

scenes.heading: INT. THIRD FLOOR LANDING
scenes.summary: Blanc has Marta reveal the hidden window behind a painting while he examines the carpet runner with a loupe, keeping everyone else off the carpet.

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY - MINUTES LATER
scenes.summary: The lawyer Alan Stevens begins reading Harlan's will to the assembled family, revealing that Harlan altered it one week ago and left everything to Marta.
scenes.turningPointNote: The will reading completely upends the family dynamics and Marta's situation, making her the sole inheritor

scenes.heading: EXT. THROMBEY ESTATE FRONT DRIVE
scenes.summary: Marta stumbles out of the house in shock while the entire family floods after her shouting, and when her car won't start, Ransom appears and offers her a ride.

scenes.heading: INT. RANSOM'S PORSCHE
scenes.summary: Ransom drives Marta away from the house in his Porsche, laughing while she remains shell-shocked, then asks her seriously what the hell happened.

scenes.heading: EXT. ROADSIDE FAMILY RESTAURANT - LATER
scenes.summary: The Porsche is parked outside a roadside family restaurant.

scenes.heading: INT. RESTAURANT - CORNER BOOTH
scenes.summary: Ransom and Marta sit in a restaurant booth where he encourages her to eat while she calls the inheritance a nightmare, and he agrees that Harlan's decision had more to do with the family's behavior than with her.

scenes.heading: EXT. THROMBEY ESTATE - EVENING
scenes.summary: Walt's voice is heard from inside the estate discussing legal options as dusk settles.

scenes.heading: INT. LIVING ROOM - EVENING
scenes.summary: The family paces around the living room while lawyer Alan explains there are no legal options to contest the will, shooting down suggestions of unsound mind and undue influence.

scenes.heading: INT. RESTAURANT - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Marta finishes telling Ransom everything about the night Harlan died, and Ransom reflects on how Harlan told him that Marta beat him at GO more than Ransom did.
scenes.turningPointNote: Marta reveals the full truth about Harlan's death to Ransom, fundamentally changing their dynamic

scenes.heading: INT. DRAWING ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Meg hangs up the phone looking horrified and mortified, turning to face her expectant family with tears in her eyes.

scenes.heading: INT. RESTAURANT - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Marta realizes the phone connection is dead while Ransom asks about the detective's findings and advises her to ride out the investigation since Blanc has nothing concrete.

scenes.heading: INT. MARTA'S BEDROOM - EARLY MORNING
scenes.summary: Marta wakes to her sister Alice frantically asking if they're rich, and discovers she has 28 missed calls on her phone.

scenes.heading: INT. CABRERA LIVING ROOM
scenes.summary: Marta finds her family watching local news coverage about her inheritance while reporters gather outside their apartment building.

scenes.heading: EXT. THROMBEY ESTATE FRONT DRIVE - DAY
scenes.summary: Blanc arrives at the Thrombey estate in Wagner's police car.

scenes.heading: INT. GREATNANA'S ROOM
scenes.summary: Blanc visits Greatnana in her dim room and offers condolences for Harlan's death, reflecting on grief, age, and the complexity of truth.

scenes.heading: INT. CABRERA LIVING ROOM
scenes.summary: Marta's mother gives her legal documents and business cards left by lawyers, expressing concern about the situation.

scenes.heading: INT. APARTMENT BUILDING HALLWAY
scenes.summary: Walt confronts Marta in her apartment hallway, warning her about opportunistic lawyers while she notices a mysterious envelope among her mail.

scenes.heading: INT. CABRERA KITCHEN
scenes.summary: Marta opens the mysterious envelope to find a photocopy of a medical examiner document with her name tag and a handwritten note saying 'I KNOW WHAT YOU DID.'
scenes.turningPointNote: The blackmail letter introduces a new threat that could expose Marta's secret

scenes.heading: INT. RANSOM'S LIVING ROOM
scenes.summary: Ransom examines the blackmail letter and identifies it as a blood toxicology report header that would show the morphine overdose, while revealing he was Harlan's research assistant.

scenes.heading: EXT. NORFOLK ROADS
scenes.summary: A police car speeds through town with sirens blazing.

scenes.heading: EXT. MEDICAL EXAMINER'S OFFICE
scenes.summary: Blanc arrives at the medical examiner's office to find it destroyed by an explosion and fire, with all blood stores and records gone.
scenes.turningPointNote: The destruction of the medical examiner's office eliminates evidence while suggesting the blackmailer has the only remaining copy

scenes.heading: INT. MARTA'S CAR
scenes.summary: Marta and Ransom sit in her car near the destroyed building discussing who would blow up an official building just to blackmail her, while she checks her email for instructions.

scenes.heading: EXT. MEDICAL EXAMINER'S OFFICE
scenes.summary: Blanc spots Marta's car from outside the medical examiner's office.

scenes.heading: INT. MARTA'S CAR
scenes.summary: Blanc walks directly toward Marta's car while Ransom tells her that destroying the toxicology report copy would clear her completely, and she floors the accelerator as Blanc approaches.

scenes.heading: EXT. MEDICAL EXAMINER'S OFFICE
scenes.summary: Marta's car peels out and speeds away while Blanc runs back to get the police cars to pursue her.

scenes.heading: INT. MARTA'S CAR
scenes.summary: Marta drives with police cars in pursuit while Ransom puts on his seatbelt and she ignores Blanc's phone calls.

scenes.heading: EXT. NORFOLK ROADS
scenes.summary: Marta's car speeds down the road with cop cars a quarter mile behind.

scenes.heading: INT. COP CAR
scenes.summary: Blanc rides in the back of the police car as they pursue Marta at 85 mph with orders not to use force.

scenes.heading: INT. MARTA'S CAR
scenes.summary: Marta's car struggles to reach 55 mph while police cars pull alongside, and despite Ransom's protests about missing her chance, she decides to pull over.

scenes.heading: EXT. NORFOLK ROADS
scenes.summary: Marta stops suddenly, causing the police cars to overshoot, then escapes through narrow city streets and alleys where the larger police cars cannot follow.

scenes.heading: INT. MARTA'S CAR
scenes.summary: Marta and Ransom catch their breath in a secluded parking lot when Blanc suddenly appears at the car window with police backup.

scenes.heading: EXT. PARKING LOT
scenes.summary: Blanc reveals that Greatnana saw someone climb the trellis the night of the party and identified them as Ransom, leading to Ransom being taken away by police.
scenes.turningPointNote: Ransom is revealed as having returned to the house that night and is arrested, shifting suspicion away from Marta

scenes.heading: EXT. NORFOLK ROADS
scenes.summary: Police cars drive through town with Marta's car bringing up the rear.

scenes.heading: INT. MARTA'S CAR
scenes.summary: Blanc rides with Marta discussing the case as a 'donut with a hole in the middle' while she nervously watches the time approach 10 AM and spots Columbus Road.

scenes.heading: EXT. NORFOLK ROADS
scenes.summary: Marta's car breaks away from the police caravan with a sharp turn.

scenes.heading: EXT. 1209 COLUMBUS ROAD
scenes.summary: Marta arrives at 1209 Columbus Road, tells Blanc she'll be a few minutes, and runs into a hair salon.

scenes.heading: EXT. BACK ALLEY
scenes.summary: Marta exits through the salon's back door and slips into the back entrance of the vacant storefront at 1209.

scenes.heading: INT. 1209 COLUMBUS ROAD
scenes.summary: Marta enters the dark empty space, finds her medical bag and burned paper remnants, then discovers a person seated silently in a chair who appears to be Fran.
scenes.turningPointNote: Marta discovers Fran in the abandoned building, apparently the blackmailer, setting up the climactic confrontation

scenes.heading: EXT. 1209 COLUMBUS ROAD
scenes.summary: Blanc waits in the car when an ambulance arrives at the storefront two doors down from the hair salon.

scenes.heading: INT. HOSPITAL WAITING ROOM - LATER
scenes.summary: Marta and Blanc sit in a hospital waiting room where Blanc reveals that Ransom has confessed everything to the police while Fran's condition remains critical.
scenes.turningPointNote: Ransom's confession and Fran's hospitalization represent major plot revelations and escalation

scenes.heading: EXT. NORFOLK ROADS
scenes.summary: Marta drives through the countryside telling her story to Blanc, who listens while looking thoughtfully at the passing scenery.

scenes.heading: EXT. THROMBEY ESTATE FRONT DRIVE - AFTERNOON
scenes.summary: Marta's car arrives at the Thrombey estate where all the family cars and police cruisers are parked.

scenes.heading: INT. MARTA'S CAR
scenes.summary: Marta finishes telling Blanc about finding Fran and calling the ambulance, then prepares to face whatever comes next at the house.

scenes.heading: INT. FOYER
scenes.summary: Marta and Blanc enter the foyer where family members wait, and Meg tearfully apologizes to Marta for revealing information about her mother.

scenes.heading: INT. DRAWING ROOM
scenes.summary: Marta retrieves a folded paper from the clock drawer and hands it to Blanc, joking that he's not much of a detective while he responds that she's a lousy murderer.

scenes.heading: INT. LIVING ROOM
scenes.summary: Marta begins to confess to the gathered family and police, but Blanc interrupts her mid-sentence and angrily berates the family for treating her poorly while trying to steal back the fortune they lost.
scenes.turningPointNote: Blanc stops Marta's confession and turns the tables on the family, shifting from Marta as guilty party to the family as vultures

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY
scenes.summary: Blanc steers Marta into the library while she protests wanting to confess, and he arranges for Wagner to clear the family from the house but keep some officers standing by.

scenes.heading: INT. SMALL STUDY - NIGHT OF PARTY
scenes.summary: In flashback, Ransom and Harlan face each other as Harlan declares he won't give a red dime or word of his work to any family member, including Ransom.

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY
scenes.summary: Blanc asks Marta to recall what Ransom said his conversation with Harlan ended with, and questions why the topic of the will would have steered to Marta.

scenes.heading: INT. SMALL STUDY - NIGHT OF PARTY
scenes.summary: In flashback, Harlan tells Ransom he's giving his entire fortune to Marta, causing Ransom to call him insane and issue a warning before the scene pushes into a wall vent.

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY
scenes.summary: Ransom dismisses Blanc's theory as conjecture without evidence, while Blanc continues building his case about Ransom's sense of clarity and need to make do for himself.

scenes.heading: EXT. NORFOLK ROADS - NIGHT OF PARTY
scenes.summary: Ransom's Porsche skids to a stop on an empty road, idles briefly, then makes a skidding U-turn and drives back as Blanc narrates about a plan forming.

scenes.heading: EXT. PRIVATE ROAD - NIGHT OF PARTY
scenes.summary: Ransom's Porsche kills its lights and drives slowly down the private road, taking the utility road to avoid the security camera range.

scenes.heading: EXT. WOODS - NIGHT OF PARTY
scenes.summary: Ransom parks his Porsche and hacks his way through the woods on foot toward the house.

scenes.heading: EXT. THROMBEY ESTATE SIDE YARD - NIGHT OF PARTY
scenes.summary: Ransom slips through the side gate and climbs up the trellis while the party continues inside, avoiding detection by the family downstairs.

scenes.heading: INT. THIRD FLOOR LANDING - NIGHT OF PARTY
scenes.summary: Ransom climbs through the painting wall entrance, leaving mud traces, and heads straight to Harlan's bedroom while Blanc narrates about needing to be alone and undetected.

scenes.heading: INT. HARLAN'S BEDROOM
scenes.summary: In Harlan's dark bedroom, Ransom uses syringes to extract liquids from the Toradol and morphine vials, switches their contents, and takes the Naloxone antidote before leaving.
scenes.turningPointNote: The revelation of Ransom's medication tampering - the central crime that set everything in motion

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY
scenes.summary: Marta realizes that if the medications were switched, her mix-up actually corrected them, giving Harlan the right doses, while Blanc demonstrates with taped vials that she identified morphine by its slight difference in viscosity.
scenes.turningPointNote: The revelation that Marta didn't kill Harlan - she saved him from Ransom's murder attempt

scenes.heading: EXT. THROMBEY ESTATE SIDE YARD - NIGHT OF PARTY
scenes.summary: In flashback, Greatnana asks Ransom if he's back again already, revealing he had been there earlier that night when she saw him coming down from the trellis.

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY
scenes.summary: Ransom dismisses Blanc's theory as stupid with no evidence, but Blanc points out they have Marta's confession and asks to continue spinning his theory further.

scenes.heading: EXT. THROMBEY ESTATE SIDE YARD - NIGHT OF PARTY - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: In flashback, Ransom returns later that night to retrieve the tampered vials but is thwarted when the dogs bark loudly, waking Meg and forcing him to retreat.

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY
scenes.summary: Blanc explains that instead of news of a medical error and guilty nurse, Ransom learned of Harlan's slit throat and apparent suicide.

scenes.heading: INT. RANSOM'S APARTMENT LIVING ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: In flashback, nervous Ransom tears a newspaper clipping about Harlan's death, stuffs it in an envelope with cash, and addresses it to Blanc using a New Yorker profile.

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY
scenes.summary: Blanc explains how Ransom anonymously hired him because he knew Marta committed a crime but couldn't reveal how he knew, and notes Ransom missed the funeral waiting for his chance to retrieve the vials.

scenes.heading: INT. THIRD FLOOR LANDING - AFTERNOON - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: In flashback, Ransom climbs under police tape into Harlan's study thinking no one is home, but Fran spots him tampering with the medical bag and realizes he's up to no good.

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY
scenes.summary: Marta realizes Fran's movie reference was about her theory, and Blanc explains how Fran got a toxicology report through her cousin at the examiner's office to test her suspicions about Ransom.

scenes.heading: INT. RANSOM'S LIVING ROOM - DAY - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: In flashback, Ransom receives the blackmail note and slowly grins, elated because he still thinks the toxicology report will prove Marta's guilt.

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY - DAY - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: In flashback at the will reading, Ransom sits with a sly smile, ready to watch the family tear themselves apart, secure that the toxicology report will undo everything.

scenes.heading: INT. RESTAURANT - NIGHT - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: In flashback at the restaurant, Marta confesses to Ransom, whose face becomes unreadable as he realizes she committed no crime and the toxicology report will prove her innocence.

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY
scenes.summary: Blanc rounds on Ransom and declares that unless Ransom decides to take action, he has lost everything.

scenes.heading: INT. RESTAURANT - NIGHT - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: In flashback, Ransom gives Marta his pep talk, telling her she's not going to give up the money.

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY
scenes.summary: Blanc echoes Ransom's words about not giving up the money.

scenes.heading: INT. RESTAURANT - NIGHT - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: In flashback, Ransom tells Marta she's come this far.

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY
scenes.summary: Blanc continues Ransom's encouragement about coming this far and taking one last step, as a lighter ignites a rag in a gas can that gets thrown through a window.

scenes.heading: INT. MEDICAL EXAMINERS OFFICE MORGUE - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: The flaming gas can falls through a high window into the dark medical examiner's morgue, igniting and reflecting flames off glass cases of blood samples.

scenes.heading: INT. RANSOM'S APARTMENT - LIVING ROOM - NIGHT / DAY?
scenes.summary: Ransom tears the bottom portion off a blackmail note with an 8AM meeting time, puts the top in an envelope, and types an email to Marta with a 10AM meeting time.

scenes.heading: INT. APARTMENT BACK HALLWAY - NIGHT - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: In flashback, Ransom creeps down a hallway and slips an envelope through the letter slot of Marta's apartment door.

scenes.heading: EXT. 1209 COLUMBUS ROAD - MORNING - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: Ransom's Porsche pulls up to 1209 Columbus Road in the morning, and he gets out pulling on gloves for his appointment with Fran.

scenes.heading: INT. 1209 COLUMBUS ROAD - 8AM - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: Fran confronts Ransom about being guilty, and he attacks her, putting his hand over her mouth and injecting her neck with a syringe before she can finish her warning.

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY
scenes.summary: Marta begins to speak about what Fran said to her.

scenes.heading: INT. 1209 COLUMBUS ROAD - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: In flashback, Marta holds dying Fran on the floor as Fran whispers her final words.

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY
scenes.summary: Marta corrects the interpretation of Fran's dying words, explaining she wasn't talking about Marta.

scenes.heading: INT. 1209 COLUMBUS ROAD - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: The same flashback moment replays, but this time Fran clearly says 'Hugh did this' instead of 'you did this.'
scenes.turningPointNote: The crucial revelation that Fran identified Ransom (Hugh) as her attacker, not Marta

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY
scenes.summary: Marta explains that Fran said 'Hugh did this' because Ransom made the help call him Hugh, and Blanc tells Ransom his plan would have worked if not for missing the anonymous call and Fran's safety copy.

scenes.heading: INT. 1209 COLUMBUS ROAD - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: In flashback, Marta turns back to dying Fran, calls 911, and gives her mouth-to-mouth resuscitation, saving Fran's life despite knowing it means losing the inheritance and going to jail.

scenes.heading: INT. LIBRARY
scenes.summary: Ransom looks afraid for the first time and asks if Fran is alive, then Marta receives a hospital call confirming Fran is okay and ready to talk, before Ransom lunges at Marta with a knife but gets tackled by officers.
scenes.turningPointNote: Ransom's final desperate attack on Marta when he realizes he's caught - the climactic confrontation

scenes.heading: INT. SMALL STUDY
scenes.summary: Linda carefully places Harlan's old baseball back in the small study, notices a pink envelope on the desk, and picks up the blank note inside with a sad smile of recognition.

scenes.heading: EXT. THROMBEY ESTATE FRONT DRIVE - LATER
scenes.summary: Linda joins the family outside as Ransom is loaded into a police car, and she uses a cigarette lighter to warm the blank note, revealing hidden writing that appears.

scenes.heading: INT. LIVING ROOM
scenes.summary: Marta sits with a blanket as Blanc approaches, and he reveals he suspected her from the moment he saw the tiny blood spot on her shoe, then advises her that she won by playing her own game rather than Harlan's.

scenes.heading: INT. FOYER - LATER
scenes.summary: Marta shuffles to the front doorway and takes one last glance at Harlan's portrait, which now appears to have a gentle and content grin.

scenes.heading: EXT. FRONT PORCH / BALCONY
scenes.summary: Marta stands on the threshold watching Blanc drive away with Ransom in the back of a police cruiser, while the displaced family on the lawn turns to see her standing small but somehow significant in the doorway of her house.
scenes.turningPointNote: The final image of Marta as the rightful owner of the house, with the family now displaced and looking up at her

structuralWarnings.text: 2 of 3 key moments were auto-corrected by Phase 1C
